creator: stanislav@icmail.ru
text:
Good day!
By the machine is installed /usr/ports/net-p2p/ktorrent. Latest version is 4.0.4. If some hundreds seedings are carried out, and speed of the active makes ~15 Mb\sec upload memory leak is watched.
